meta.title: NexTasks
meta.description: Website for managing habits and tasks.

hero.title: Transform your goals into consistent habits with intelligence.
hero.subTitle: An intelligent platform for managing habits, tasks, and goals, with AI, gamification, and complete tracking of your progress.

about.title: About the Platform
about.p1: Maintaining consistent habits and organizing routines is a challenge for many people. The lack of personalization and continuous motivation in current tools makes it difficult to track goals and achieve personal development.
about.p2: Our platform was created to solve this problem. It combines habit management, task control, goal setting, and artificial intelligence in a single environment. This allows you to plan your routine, track your progress, and build discipline in a practical and efficient way.
about.p3: With intelligent features and social interaction, the system transforms personal goals into daily actions, promoting continuous and measurable growth.

benefits.title: Main Benefits
benefits.subTitle: Organize your routine, stay focused, and progress consistently. The platform is designed to simplify habit and goal management, offering smart tools that help you transform planning into real results.
benefits.benefits1: Increase your productivity with organized routines.
benefits.benefits2: Develop discipline and consistency in your habits.
benefits.benefits3: Track your progress with clear graphs.
benefits.benefits4: Receive smart suggestions to improve your performance.
benefits.benefits5: Stay motivated with gamification and achievements.
benefits.benefits6: Compare your progress with friends and challenges.
benefits.benefits7: Gain a complete overview of your personal goals.
benefits.benefits8: Receive smart reminders so you don't miss your tasks.

features.title: Main Features
features.description: Discover the features that make your routine more organized, intelligent, and motivating.

feature1.title: Routine
feature1.description: Build your schedule your way, fully customizable

feature2.title: Habits
feature2.description: Track your habits and stay consistent every day.

feature3.title: Goals
feature3.description: Set clear goals and monitor your progress.

feature4.title: Tasks
feature4.description: Organize tasks to make the most of your free time.

feature5.title: Progress
feature5.description: Visualize your performance in a simple way.

feature6.title: Reminders
feature6.description: Get smart alerts so you never miss a task.

feature7.title: AI
feature7.description: Receive intelligent suggestions to improve your routine.

feature8.title: Points
feature8.description: Earn rewards as you stay consistent.

feature9.title: Friends
feature9.description: Connect with others and share your progress.

feature10.title: Challenges
feature10.description: Compare results and boost your motivation.

feature11.title: Ranking
feature11.description: Track your position and grow with healthy competition.

feature12.title: Achievements
feature12.description: Unlock badges and celebrate your progress.

callToAction.title: Start your evolution today
callToAction.description: Build better habits, organize your routine, and achieve your goals with consistency.
